mapper.select: SELECT e.event_seq ,e.title ,e.event_type ,e.start_at AS event_start_dt ,e.end_at AS event_end_dt ,e.venue_name AS location FROM event.events e WHERE e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'published' AND e.is_paid IS TRUE AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event.event_pricing ep WHERE ep.event_seq = e.event_seq AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND ep.use_yn = 'Y' AND ep.currency_code IN ('USD', 'KRW') ) ORDER BY e.start_at DESC NULLS LAST, e.event_seq DESC

SELECT ep.event_pricing_seq ,ep.event_seq ,ep.price_type ,ep.price_name ,ep.currency_code ,ep.amount ,ep.sales_start_at ,ep.sales_end_at ,COALESCE(payment_usage.sold_count, 0) AS sold_count FROM event.event_pricing ep LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'paid') AS sold_count FROM event.payments p WHERE p.event_pricing_seq = ep.event_pricing_seq ) payment_usage ON TRUE WHERE ep.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND ep.use_yn = 'Y' AND ep.currency_code IN ('USD', 'KRW') ORDER BY ep.sort_seq ASC, ep.event_pricing_seq ASC

SELECT ep.event_pricing_seq ,ep.event_seq ,ep.price_type ,ep.price_name ,ep.currency_code ,ep.amount ,ep.sales_start_at ,ep.sales_end_at FROM event.event_pricing ep INNER JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = ep.event_seq AND e.deleted_at IS NULL AND e.status = 'published' AND e.is_paid IS TRUE WHERE ep.event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND ep.event_pricing_seq = #{eventPricingSeq} AND ep.deleted_at IS NULL AND ep.use_yn = 'Y' AND ep.currency_code IN ('USD', 'KRW') FOR UPDATE

INSERT INTO event.participants ( email ,first_name ,middle_name ,last_name ,organization_name ,position ,country ) VALUES ( LOWER(#{email}) ,#{firstName} ,NULLIF(#{middleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,#{lastName} ,NULLIF(#{organizationName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ,NULLIF(#{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') ) ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET first_name = EXCLUDED.first_name ,middle_name = EXCLUDED.middle_name ,last_name = EXCLUDED.last_name ,organization_name = EXCLUDED.organization_name ,position = EXCLUDED.position ,country = EXCLUDED.country ,updated_at = now() RETURNING participant_seq

INSERT INTO event.event_participants ( event_seq ,participant_seq ,status ,registered_at ,cancelled_at ,cancel_reason ) VALUES ( #{eventSeq} ,#{participantSeq} ,'registered' ,now() ,NULL ,NULL ) ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT event_participants_event_seq_participant_seq_key DO UPDATE SET status = 'registered' ,cancelled_at = NULL ,cancel_reason = NULL RETURNING event_participant_seq

SELECT payment_intent_seq ,pg_provider ,pg_mid ,pg_order_id ,amount ,currency ,payment_method ,status ,raw_response ,event_seq ,event_pricing_seq ,original_amount ,discount_amount ,refunded_amount ,payer_name ,payer_email ,payer_country ,first_name ,middle_name ,last_name ,organization_name ,position ,failed_reason ,completed_at ,payment_seq ,created_by ,created_at ,updated_by ,updated_at FROM event.payment_intents WHERE pg_order_id = #{orderId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT payment_seq ,pg_provider ,pg_mid ,pg_transaction_id ,pg_order_id ,amount ,currency ,payment_method ,status ,paid_at ,failed_reason ,event_seq ,event_participant_seq ,participant_seq ,payer_name ,payer_email ,payer_country ,event_pricing_seq ,original_amount ,discount_amount ,refunded_amount ,created_by ,updated_by FROM event.payments WHERE event_seq = #{eventSeq} AND event_pricing_seq = #{eventPricingSeq} AND participant_seq = #{participantSeq} ORDER BY payment_seq DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT payment_seq ,pg_provider ,pg_mid ,pg_transaction_id ,pg_order_id ,amount ,currency ,payment_method ,status ,paid_at ,failed_reason ,event_seq ,event_participant_seq ,participant_seq ,payer_name ,payer_email ,payer_country ,event_pricing_seq ,original_amount ,discount_amount ,refunded_amount ,created_by ,updated_by FROM event.payments WHERE pg_order_id = #{orderId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT payment_seq ,pg_provider ,pg_mid ,pg_transaction_id ,pg_order_id ,amount ,currency ,payment_method ,status ,paid_at ,failed_reason ,event_seq ,event_participant_seq ,participant_seq ,payer_name ,payer_email ,payer_country ,event_pricing_seq ,original_amount ,discount_amount ,refunded_amount ,created_by ,updated_by FROM event.payments WHERE pg_order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT p.payment_seq ,p.pg_order_id AS order_id ,p.status ,p.amount ,p.currency ,e.title AS event_title ,pr.price_name ,p.pg_transaction_id ,p.pg_response_code ,p.pg_response_message ,p.failed_reason ,p.paid_at ,p.created_at FROM event.payments p LEFT JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = p.event_seq LEFT JOIN event.event_pricing pr ON pr.event_pricing_seq = p.event_pricing_seq WHERE p.pg_order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT pi.payment_seq ,pi.pg_order_id AS order_id ,pi.status ,pi.amount ,pi.currency ,e.title AS event_title ,pr.price_name ,NULL AS pg_transaction_id ,NULL AS pg_response_code ,NULL AS pg_response_message ,pi.failed_reason ,NULL AS paid_at ,pi.created_at FROM event.payment_intents pi LEFT JOIN event.events e ON e.event_seq = pi.event_seq LEFT JOIN event.event_pricing pr ON pr.event_pricing_seq = pi.event_pricing_seq WHERE pi.pg_order_id = #{orderId}
